message.content:
Read and verify the following key source files in C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant for any issues. Check each file exists and has valid content. Report any problems found.

Files to check:
1. app/build.gradle.kts
2. build.gradle.kts  
3. settings.gradle.kts
4. app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
5. app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/MainActivity.kt
6. app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/viewmodel/MainViewModel.kt
7. app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/Navigation.kt
8. app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/MainScreen.kt
9. app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/WebViewScreen.kt

For each file, read it and check:
- Does it compile logically (correct imports, matching class/function signatures)?
- Are there any obvious issues like missing imports, wrong package names, or broken references?

Report a summary of findings.

content.text: I'll read all 9 files and verify them. Let me start by reading them all.

content.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CALENDAR" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_CALENDAR" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        android:maxSdkVersion="28" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"
        android:maxSdkVersion="32" />

    <application
        android:name=".CourtApp"
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
        android:label="法院助手"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.CourtAssistant"
        android:usesCleartextTraffic="true">

        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

        <provider
            android:name="androidx.core.content.FileProvider"
            android:authorities="${applicationId}.fileprovider"
            android:exported="false"
            android:grantUriPermissions="true">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.support.FILE_PROVIDER_PATHS"
                android:resource="@xml/file_paths" />
        </provider>
    </application>
</manifest>

input.description: Read Theme.kt to check for color definitions

content.content:
package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.Typography
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontFamily
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

val CourtTypography = Typography(
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 2.sp
    ),
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        letterSpacing = 1.sp
    ),
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 18.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 15.sp
    ),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 15.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp
    ),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp
    ),
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)

package com.court.assistant.data.db

import androidx.room.*

@Entity(
    tableName = "pdf_documents",
    foreignKeys = [ForeignKey(
        entity = CourtSmsEntity::class,
        parentColumns = ["id"],
        childColumns = ["smsId"],
        onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
    )],
    indices = [
        Index(value = ["smsId"]),
        Index(value = ["smsId", "fileName"], unique = true)
    ]
)
data class PdfDocumentEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val smsId: Long,
    val fileName: String,
    val filePath: String,
    val fileSize: Long,
    val downloadedAt: Long,
    val isSubpoena: Boolean = false,
    val hearingInfo: String? = null,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋氏美学配色 - 素雅中式风格
val Ivory = Color(0xFFFFF8F0)          // 米白底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFFFDF5)      // 暖白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF2C2C2C)       // 墨色文字
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF4A4A4A)   // 深灰
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFFC04851)    // 朱红点缀
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFE8939A)  // 浅朱红
val MistGray = Color(0xFFE8E4DF)       // 雾灰分割线
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFF5F0E8)    // 羊皮纸背景
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF5B8C5A)      // 玉绿（成功色）
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFD4A843)      // 琥珀金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}

package com.court.assistant.data.db

import androidx.room.*

@Entity(
    tableName = "court_sms",
    indices = [Index(value = ["bodyHash"], unique = true)]
)
data class CourtSmsEntity(
    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    val sender: String,
    val body: String,
    val bodyHash: Int,
    val receivedAt: Long,
    val caseNumber: String?,
    val courtName: String?,
    val hearingTime: Long?,
    val partyNames: String?,
    val webUrl: String?,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)

content.text: I'll read all 9 files and verify their content. Let me start by reading them all.

Here is the full summary of findings for all 9 files in `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant`:

---

## File Verification Summary

### 1. `build.gradle.kts` (root) -- OK
- Plugin versions are consistent: AGP 8.2, Kotlin 1.9.22, KSP 1.9.22-1.0.17.
- No issues.

### 2. `settings.gradle.kts` -- OK
- Repositories configured correctly (google, mavenCentral, gradlePluginPortal).
- Root project name matches "CourtAssistant", includes `:app`.
- No issues.

### 3. `app/build.gradle.kts` -- OK
- Namespace `com.court.assistant`, compileSdk/targetSdk 34, minSdk 26, Java 17.
- Compose BOM 2024.01.00 with compiler extension 1.5.8 (matches Kotlin 1.9.22).
- Dependencies are coherent: Room + KSP, iText7, ML Kit Chinese OCR, OkHttp, Navigation Compose, Webkit.
- No issues.

### 4. `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` -- ISSUE FOUND
- References `android:name=".CourtApp"` as the Application class. File `CourtApp.kt` exists -- OK.
- References `@style/Theme.CourtAssistant` -- this must be defined in `res/values/themes.xml`. Not verified but standard.
- References `@xml/file_paths` for FileProvider -- `file_paths.xml` exists -- OK.
- References `@mipmap/ic_launcher` -- standard, assumed present.
- No structural issues.

### 5. `app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/MainActivity.kt` -- OK
- Package `com.court.assistant`, extends `ComponentActivity`.
- Imports `CourtAssistantTheme` from `ui.theme`, `Navigation` from `ui`, `MainViewModel` from `viewmodel` -- all exist.
- Uses `ViewModelProvider(this)[MainViewModel::class.java]` -- correct for `AndroidViewModel`.
- Permission handling logic is sound.
- No issues.

### 6. `app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/viewmodel/MainViewModel.kt` -- OK
- Casts `application as CourtApp` -- requires `CourtApp` to expose `repository`. Assumed correct.
- References `SmsReader`, `SmsParser`, `CalendarSync`, `PdfDownloadManager`, `PdfParser`, `DownloadResult` -- all source files exist in their respective packages.
- References `CourtSmsEntity`, `PdfDocumentEntity` -- both exist in `data.db`.
- `repo.getAllSms()` returns Flow, `repo.getPdfsBySmsId()` returns Flow -- must match DAO. Assumed correct.
- No structural issues.

### 7. `app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/Navigation.kt` -- ISSUE FOUND
- References `PdfPreviewScreen` composable in the `"pdf/{pdfId}"` route. File `PdfPreviewScreen.kt` exists -- OK.
- However, `PdfPreviewScreen` is called with `(viewModel, pdfId, onBack)` -- its actual signature was not verified. Minor risk.
- No import issues otherwise.

### 8. `app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/MainScreen.kt` -- ISSUE FOUND
- **Line with raw newline in string literal**: The empty-state text contains:
  ```kotlin
  "暂无法院短信
  点击右上角刷新读取"
  ```
  This is a raw newline inside a regular string literal (`"..."`), which is **not valid Kotlin**. It must either use `\n` or a triple-quoted string `"""..."""`. **This will cause a compilation error.**
- All color references (`CinnabarRed`, `Ivory`, `InkBlack`, `CharcoalGray`, `WarmWhite`, `ParchmentBg`, `JadeGreen`, `AmberGold`) are defined in `Theme.kt` and imported via `com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*` -- OK.
- References `SmsWithPdfs` and `PdfDocumentEntity` -- both exist -- OK.

### 9. `app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/WebViewScreen.kt` -- ISSUE FOUND
- References `com.court.assistant.webview.CourtWebViewClient` -- file exists -- OK.
- References `com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*` colors -- all defined in `Theme.kt` -- OK.
- **`Icons.Default.ArrowBack` is deprecated** in Material3 1.2+. Should use `Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack`. This may produce a warning or error depending on the exact library version pulled by BOM 2024.01.00. Not a hard blocker but worth noting.
- No other structural issues.

---

## Critical Issue

**`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\MainScreen.kt`** -- The empty-state text on approximately line 97 has a raw newline inside a regular string literal. This will fail to compile.

Fix: change
```kotlin
"暂无法院短信
点击右上角刷新读取"
```
to
```kotlin
"暂无法院短信\n点击右上角刷新读取"
```

## Minor / Warnings

1. **WebViewScreen.kt** -- `Icons.Default.ArrowBack` is deprecated in newer Material Icons versions. Replace with `Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack`.
2. **Theme.kt** -- Color constants are defined directly in `Theme.kt` rather than a separate `Color.kt`. This works fine but is unconventional for larger projects.
3. **MainScreen.kt** uses emoji characters (`"📄"`, `"📋"`) directly in string literals. This works but rendering depends on the device font.

## All Dependencies Verified Present

| Referenced Class/File | Location | Exists |
|---|---|---|
| `CourtApp` | `com.court.assistant` | Yes |
| `CourtWebViewClient` | `com.court.assistant.webview` | Yes |
| `PdfPreviewScreen` | `com.court.assistant.ui` | Yes |
| `CourtSmsEntity` | `com.court.assistant.data.db` | Yes |
| `PdfDocumentEntity` | `com.court.assistant.data.db` | Yes |
| `CourtDao` / `CourtDatabase` | `com.court.assistant.data.db` | Yes |
| `SmsReader` / `SmsParser` | `com.court.assistant.sms` | Yes |
| `PdfDownloadManager` / `PdfParser` | `com.court.assistant.pdf` | Yes |
| `CalendarSync` | `com.court.assistant.calendar` | Yes |
| `DownloadResult` | `com.court.assistant.pdf` | Yes |
| `file_paths.xml` | `res/xml` | Yes |
| Theme colors & typography | `ui.theme.Theme.kt` / `Type.kt` | Yes |

The project is in good shape overall. The one **compilation-blocking issue** is the raw newline in `MainScreen.kt`.

<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_SMS" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_CALENDAR" />

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE"

    <application
        android:name=".CourtApp"
        android:allowBackup="true"

content.text:
All 9 files have been read successfully. Here is the summary of findings:

---

## File Verification Summary

### 1. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\build.gradle.kts`
- **Status: OK**
- Declares AGP 8.2.2, Kotlin 1.9.22, KSP 1.9.22-1.0.17. All versions are compatible.

### 2. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\settings.gradle.kts`
- **Status: OK**
- Standard plugin management and dependency resolution. Root project name matches "CourtAssistant", includes `:app`.

### 3. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\build.gradle.kts`
- **Status: OK**
- Namespace `com.court.assistant`, compileSdk/targetSdk 34, minSdk 26, JVM 17, Compose compiler 1.5.8 (matches Kotlin 1.9.22). Dependencies look correct and consistent.

### 4. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\AndroidManifest.xml`
- **Status: OK**
- Declares `android:name=".CourtApp"` as the Application class -- this class is referenced but was **not in the list of files to check**. It must exist at `com.court.assistant.CourtApp` or the app will crash on launch.
- FileProvider references `@xml/file_paths` -- that XML resource must also exist.
- Permissions, activity declaration, and intent filter are all correct.

### 5. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\MainActivity.kt`
- **Status: OK**
- Package `com.court.assistant`, imports match. Uses `ViewModelProvider` to get `MainViewModel`. Requests SMS and calendar permissions. Calls `Navigation(viewModel)` inside `CourtAssistantTheme`. No issues.

### 6. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\viewmodel\MainViewModel.kt`
- **Status: OK with dependency concerns**
- References several classes not in the checked file list:
  - `com.court.assistant.CourtApp` (Application subclass)
  - `com.court.assistant.calendar.CalendarSync`
  - `com.court.assistant.data.db.CourtSmsEntity`, `PdfDocumentEntity`
  - `com.court.assistant.pdf.PdfDownloadManager`, `PdfParser`, `DownloadResult`
  - `com.court.assistant.sms.SmsParser`, `SmsReader`
  - A `repository` property on `CourtApp`
- All logic is internally consistent. No import or signature issues within this file itself.

### 7. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\Navigation.kt`
- **Status: ISSUE FOUND**
- References `PdfPreviewScreen(viewModel, pdfId, onBack)` in the `"pdf/{pdfId}"` route, but **`PdfPreviewScreen` is not defined in any of the checked files**. This composable must exist somewhere in the project or this will fail to compile.
- The `MainScreen` call signature matches: `(viewModel, onOpenWebView, onOpenPdf)` -- correct.
- The `WebViewScreen` call signature matches: `(viewModel, smsId, url, onBack)` -- correct.

### 8. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\MainScreen.kt`
- **Status: MINOR ISSUE**
- References theme colors (`CinnabarRed`, `Ivory`, `InkBlack`, `CharcoalGray`, `AmberGold`, `JadeGreen`, `WarmWhite`, `ParchmentBg`) from `com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*` -- these must be defined in a theme file.
- The string `"暂无法院短信\n点击右上角刷新读取"` appears to use a raw newline in the source (the `cat` output showed it on two lines). This is valid Kotlin (multiline string or `\n`), but worth verifying it is intentional.
- Otherwise structurally sound. Composable signatures are consistent.

### 9. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\WebViewScreen.kt`
- **Status: OK with dependency concern**
- References `com.court.assistant.webview.CourtWebViewClient` -- must exist in the project.
- References theme colors from `com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*`.
- The `downloadPdf` call in `setDownloadListener` passes `(downloadUrl, smsId, fileName, cookies)` which matches the ViewModel signature `downloadPdf(url, smsId, fileName?, cookies?)` -- correct.
- The `onPdfDetected` callback only passes `(pdfUrl, smsId, cookies=cookies)` omitting `fileName`, which uses the default `null` -- correct.

---

## Issues Requiring Action

| # | Severity | File | Issue |
|---|----------|------|-------|
| 1 | **HIGH** | `Navigation.kt` | `PdfPreviewScreen` composable is referenced but not defined in any checked file. Must exist elsewhere or compilation will fail. |
| 2 | **HIGH** | Multiple | `CourtApp` class (referenced in Manifest and ViewModel) was not among checked files. Must exist with a `repository` property. |
| 3 | **MEDIUM** | Multiple | Several supporting classes are required but not checked: `CalendarSync`, `CourtSmsEntity`, `PdfDocumentEntity`, `PdfDownloadManager`, `PdfParser`, `DownloadResult`, `SmsParser`, `SmsReader`, `CourtWebViewClient`, and the theme color definitions. |
| 4 | **LOW** | Manifest | `@xml/file_paths` resource must exist for the FileProvider. |

The 9 files themselves are internally consistent and well-structured. The main risk is the unchecked dependency files -- particularly `PdfPreviewScreen`, `CourtApp`, and the theme definitions. Would you like me to verify those files exist in the project?
